name: A-Team Sports Training
about: A-Team Sports Training is a locally owned and operated multi-sport facility featuring climate-controlled training spaces and industry-leading Full Swing golf simulators. The venue offers turf rentals for baseball and softball, an indoor driving range, a weight room, and athletic performance training memberships. For entertainment, the Full Swing simulators provide access to world-famous golf courses like Pebble Beach, as well as a variety of other sports games and interactive activities. The facility also includes The Dugout, a concessions area serving food and beverages to athletes and their families.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading Full Swing simulators access to world-famous courses like Pebble Beach
Variety of interactive games beyond golf for a fun, unique experience
Spacious, climate-controlled facility with a comfortable and energetic atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Available at The Dugout concessions area
No mention of alcohol being available for purchase

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading Full Swing golf and game simulators

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and beverages for purchase at The Dugout concessions area, but it does not specify if outside food and drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for completing an 18-hole round on the simulators.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes. A-Team Sports is family-friendly and specifically mentions that their simulators are perfect for kids and family events. They also offer junior memberships for softball.
